full_text:
The sample had no clearly identifiable tumor tissue but used all leftover tissue for the dissociation.

Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 4 ml of media. A 1:10 dilution was made for counting.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

4 vials of 5 E6 cells each were frozen.

Cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 12.5
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 7.35
 | viability [%] | 58.7
 | size [µm] | 8.1
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 12.8
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 7.08
 | viability [%] | 55.4
 | size [µm] | 7.7
Average | [cells/ml] | 12.65 E6 x 10
=126.5 E6
 | total [cells] | 506 E6 in 4 ml
 | viability [%] | 57.05
